revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-075

Sounding valve (in a compressed-air fog signal apparatus)

The valve controlling the admission of the compressed air which is modulated to provide the sound output.

{{IALAFooter}}
